title: stylisma patens subsp. angustifolia
intro: Stylisma patens subsp. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved starflower, is a perennial plant species in the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic agent. The root of the plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy, often in the form of a tincture, infusion, or decoction, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
